tasks.description: Acquire and review analyst-selected ticker pool for Consumer Staples sector.

tasks.description: Systematically analyze tickers in batches, recording raw data for future recall.

subtasks.description: For each batch of 10 tickers, push their symbol, position, and conviction to episodic memory using episodic_remember. Use keys: first_10_tickers, second_10_tickers, etc.
observations:
Tool 'episodic_remember' returned: success: true
message: Memory entry appended successfully

tasks.description: Compile shortlist and build the initial portfolio candidate.

subtasks.description: Recall all shortlisted tickers and rationale from episodic memory via episodic_recall.
Construct portfolio_dict from final selections with target allocations and positions for 18-20 longs and 12-18 shorts.

tasks.description: Validate portfolio versus all hard constraints and performance targets.

subtasks.description: Check portfolio exposures using portfolio_exposure_calculator for net and gross exposure.
Evaluate portfolio performance (annualized return, Sharpe ratio, Alpha) with calculate_portfolio_performance and calculate_ticker_performances.
If any constraint fails (exposure, beta, positions, metrics), adjust allocations/tickers and repeat validation. If all pass, continue.

tasks.description: Prepare and output structured JSON with all final portfolio recommendations.

subtasks.description: For each recommended position, include ticker, position, detailed thesis, key drivers and allocation per schema.
